---
title: Custom Extra Package
subtitle: \SunQuarTeX Examples
author: sun123zxy
date: 2023/09/21
abstract: This is an abstract. $\dv{f}{x}$ is available in the abstract.
bibliography: bibliography.bib
lang: en

number-sections: true

format:
  html:
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \(\require{physics}\)
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{physics}
---

## First

This is `physics`: $\dv{f}{x}$.
